message:
feat(checkpoint): implement incremental checkpoints (ntm-nloz)

Add differential checkpoint support that stores only changes since a base
checkpoint, significantly reducing storage for frequent checkpoints.

New features:
- IncrementalCheckpoint type with differential data structure
- Scrollback diff computation (new lines since base)
- Git patch generation between commits
- State diff for panes, session layout, and git state
- Resolve() to reconstruct full checkpoint from incremental
- ChainResolve() for incrementals based on other incrementals
- StorageSavings() to measure space efficiency

Files:
- internal/checkpoint/incremental.go - Core implementation
- internal/checkpoint/incremental_test.go - 11 comprehensive tests

Closes ntm-nloz
